Showreel

See the Craft

The Antidote to Visual Noise.

In high-ticket real estate, the listing must be the hero — not the video editor. Flashy transitions and dizzying speed ramps distract from the sanctuary of the space.

I engineer a "Quiet Luxury" visual experience. Through deliberate pacing, invisible edits, and architectural color grading, I allow potential buyers to truly feel the weight and tranquility of the property.

Cinematic Feature — 16:9
Signature Grade

The Transformation

Transforming flat log profiles into high-contrast cinematic narratives — the Nordic Luxury palette in action.

About

The specialist
agencies can't replace

"True luxury isn't found in flashy transitions and visual noise — it lives in the quiet details that define a sanctuary."

I'm Janloyd Tupas, a cinematic visual curator based in the Philippines, working with real estate agents and agencies worldwide. My background in Marine Engineering gave me a precision-first mindset — I approach every edit with the same discipline as a technical blueprint.

Under @janloyd.visuals, I specialize in Minimalist Cinematic and Quiet Luxury post-production, engineered specifically for the real estate market. Every node, every grade, every audio layer is intentional — designed to elevate a property from listing to landmark.

I work as a dedicated remote specialist — which means you get agency-level fidelity with boutique-level focus, faster turnaround, and a curator who treats your brand as their own.

What I Deliver

Scope of
Craft

01
Advanced Color Grading
Implementation of a "Nordic Luxury" palette — clean whites, neutralized yellow light contamination, and preserved exterior dynamic range. Transforming flat log profiles into high-contrast cinematic narratives using advanced node structures and custom LUTs in DaVinci Resolve.
Node Tree — DaVinci Resolve 21
02
Immersive Sound Design
Tactile audio engineering that enhances the perceived weight of materials — marble, glass, hardwood. Atmospheric reverb creates a sense of space and breathability in large architectural rooms. Every sonic layer is curated to match the visual luxury of the property.
03
Omni-Channel Optimization
The Cinematic Feature: 4K horizontal for YouTube and high-end presentations. The High-Velocity Reel: 9:16 vertical edits engineered for Instagram and TikTok engagement. Plus custom-graded hero stills for maximum click-through on listing thumbnails.
Tools & Technology

Crafted with
Precision

DaVinci Resolve Custom LUT Development Advanced Node Structures Epidemic Sound Kling AI Canva Notion
How We Work

A Seamless
Partnership

Step 01
Creative Discovery
Share your property details, target buyer persona, and brand direction. We identify the property's unique narrative and develop a bespoke visual strategy tailored to your market.
Step 02
Master Curation
Advanced 4K post-production begins — custom grading, immersive sound design, and precision editing. Your slot is locked in the production calendar with guaranteed delivery timing.
Step 03
Final Delivery
Receive cinema-grade 4K files and optimized social assets via private link. High-velocity assets ready for both internal presentations and global social reach — zero compromise.
